details.description: Shared resolveKey function implementing fallback chain: current dict → parent dict → base (en) → raw key. Also exports PARENT mapping for locale parent relationships.

Added PARENT_LOCALE mapping and parent-aware dictionary loading in loadDict(). When a locale has a parent (zht→zh), loadDict loads the parent first, then merges parent keys as fallback before locale-specific overrides. Tests: all 3 i18n test files pass (44 tests).
Replaced inline resolveKey definition with import from ./resolve. Removed unused resolveTemplate import.
Replaced inline resolveKey definition with import from ./resolve. Removed unused resolveTemplate import.
